title: Civil war (disambiguation)
content:
==[[Canon]]==
*[[Helikoprion civil war]]: c. [[244 BBY]]
*[[War on Corellia]]: [[229 BBY]]
*[[Darnaburny Civil War]]
*[[Clone Wars]]: [[22 BBY]]–[[19 BBY]]
*[[Onderonian Civil War]]: 22 BBY–[[20 BBY]]
*[[Early rebellion against the Galactic Empire]]: 19 BBY–[[1 BBY]]
*[[Galactic Civil War]]: 1 BBY–[[5 ABY]]
*[[Coruscant civil war]]: 4 ABY–5 ABY
*[[Cold War]]: 5 ABY–34 ABY
*[[Virgillian civil war]]
*[[First Order-Resistance War]]: 34 ABY–[[35 ABY]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
There have been several '''civil wars''' in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including:
*[[Rakatan Civil War]]: Pre-[[25,200 BBY]]
*[[Aqualish Civil War]]: c. [[15,000 BBY/Legends|15,000 BBY]]
*[[Unification War]]: [[7342 BBY|7342]]–[[7328 BBY]]
*[[Tarisian Civil War]]: [[4056 BBY]]–? BBY
*[[Jedi Civil War]]: [[3959 BBY|3959]]–[[3956 BBY]]
*[[Sith Civil War]]: [[3956 BBY|3956]]–[[3950 BBY]]
*[[Onderon Civil War]]: [[3951 BBY]]
*[[Alderaan Civil War]]: 3600s BBY
*[[Separatist War]]: –[[3643 BBY]]
*[[War of the Gungan tribes]]: –[[3000 BBY]]
*[[Sith civil war]]: Circa [[1100 BBY/Legends|1100]]–[[1010 BBY]]
*[[Nozho–Weogar War/Legends|Nozho–Weogar War]]: [[300 BBY/Legends|300 BBY]]
*[[Mandalorian Civil War (True Mandalorians)|Mandalorian Civil War]]: [[60 BBY/Legends|60]]–[[34 BBY/Legends|34 BBY]]
*[[Arkanian Revolution]]: [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]]
*[[Telosian Civil War]]: [[49 BBY/Legends|49 BBY]]
*[[Solay Civil War]]: [[46 BBY/Legends|46 BBY]]–[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
*[[Melida/Daan Civil War]]: —[[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]
*[[Young–Elders War]]: [[44 BBY/Legends|44 BBY]]
*[[Sepan Civil War]]: [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]–[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]
*[[Virgillian Civil War]]: [[25 BBY/Legends|24 BBY]]–[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
*[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]: [[22 BBY/Legends|22]]–[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]
*[[Krantian Civil War]]: [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]
*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]: [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]–[[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]]
*[[Drogheda Civil War]]: –[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]
*[[Imperial Civil War]]: [[4 ABY/Legends|4]]–[[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]
*[[Adumari Civil War]]: [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]]
*[[Chiss civil conflict|Chiss Civil War]]: [[22 ABY/Legends|22]]–[[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]]
*[[Second Galactic Civil War]]: [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]
*[[Sepan Civil War]]: [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]
*[[Second Imperial Civil War]]: [[137 ABY]]
*[[Taroonian Civil War]]: Date unknown
*[[Balduran Civil War]]: Date unknown
*[[Zolan Civil War]]: Date unknown
